content.full_text:
May 1, 2008

Edwin S. W. Young
Sr. Auditor
City of Palo Alto
250 Hamilton Street, 7th Floor
Palo Alto, California 94301

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-08-055

Dear Mr. Young:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the gift provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 As I explained in the message I left on your voice mail on April 29, 2008, we have withdrawn your request for written advice. If you have further questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

[Signature]
By: Tara L. Stock
Political Reform Consultant

1 The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014.
